faqData.question: What to wear?
faqData.answer: Our dress code is Gray or any touch of Blue close to that color. We'd love our guests to dress in smart casual or semi-formal attire in this palette. Please avoid wearing white so the bride can shine.

faqData.question: Where's the reception?
faqData.answer: Choco Cabana Private Resort, Dasmariñas, Cavite

faqData.question: Can I bring a plus one?
faqData.answer: Yes, you can bring a plus one! Please indicate in your RSVP if you will be bringing additional guests so we can make the necessary arrangements. Thank you!
